title: Earnings Preview: Martin Marietta (MLM) Q1 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: Martin Marietta (MLM) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Martin Marietta Announces First-Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call
text: RALEIGH, N.C., April 11, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE:MLM) (“Martin Marietta” or the “Company”) will host its first-quarter 2022 earnings conference call on Tuesday, May 3, 2022 at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The Company will release results for the quarter ended March 31, 2022, that morning before the market opens.

title: Martin Marietta Completes Divestiture of Colorado and Central Texas Ready Mixed Concrete Operations
text: RALEIGH, N.C., April 01, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE: MLM) (“Martin Marietta” or the “Company”) today announced that it has completed the previously-announced divestiture of its Colorado and Central Texas ready mixed concrete operations to Smyrna Ready Mix Concrete LLC.
